props.name: hideHeading
props.desc: Hide the card title and header area.

props.name: hideWhenEmpty
props.desc: Hide the card entirely when it has no visible child components.

props.name: accentStyle
props.desc: Apply an accent colour bar on the left side of the panel header.

props.name: collapsedByDefault
props.desc: Start the panel in its collapsed state.

props.name: collapsible
props.desc: Which element toggles collapse: the whole header, the icon only, or disabled.

props.name: expandIconPosition
props.desc: Position of the expand/collapse icon, or 'hide' to remove it.

props.name: ghost
props.desc: Render the panel without background or border (transparent style).

props.name: hasCustomHeader
props.desc: Replace the default header with custom child components.

props.name: header
props.desc: Custom header content definition ({ id, components }).

props.name: headerStyles
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to the panel header bar.

props.name: hideCollapseContent
props.desc: Hide the panel body when collapsed (removes it from DOM).

props.name: hideWhenEmpty
props.desc: Hide the panel entirely when it has no visible child components.

props.name: isSimpleDesign
props.desc: Use a simplified flat panel style without borders or shadows.

props.name: columns
props.desc: Column definitions — each with flex, offset, push, pull and child components.

props.name: gutterX
props.desc: Horizontal gutter (spacing) between columns in pixels.

props.name: gutterY
props.desc: Vertical gutter (spacing) between column rows in pixels.

props.name: alignItems
props.desc: Align children along the cross axis.

props.name: alignSelf
props.desc: Override the parent's alignItems for this container.

props.name: display
props.desc: CSS display mode for the container.

props.name: flexDirection
props.desc: Direction children are laid out.

props.name: flexWrap
props.desc: Whether children wrap onto multiple lines.

props.name: gap
props.desc: Gap between child components in pixels.

props.name: gridColumnsCount
props.desc: Number of columns when display is 'grid'.

props.name: justifyContent
props.desc: Distribute children along the main axis.

props.name: justifyItems
props.desc: Default justifySelf for all grid children.

props.name: justifySelf
props.desc: Align this container within its grid parent.

props.name: noDefaultStyling
props.desc: Remove all default padding and background from the container.

props.name: action
props.desc: Primary action executed when the drawer opens.

props.name: cancelButtonCustomEnabled
props.desc: Expression that returns true/false to enable or disable the cancel button.

props.name: cancelText
props.desc: Label for the cancel button.

props.name: footerStyles
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to the drawer footer.

props.name: headerStyles
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to the drawer header.

props.name: okButtonCustomEnabled
props.desc: Expression that returns true/false to enable or disable the OK button.

props.name: okText
props.desc: Label for the OK button.

props.name: onCancelAction
props.desc: Action executed when the drawer is cancelled.

props.name: onOkAction
props.desc: Action executed when the drawer is confirmed.

props.name: placement
props.desc: Which edge the drawer slides in from.

props.name: showFooter
props.desc: Show the drawer footer bar with OK/cancel buttons.

props.name: showHeader
props.desc: Show the drawer header bar with the title.

props.name: alignItems
props.desc: Align items along the cross axis.

props.name: columns
props.desc: Column definitions for each info cell ({ id, width, flexDirection, textAlign, components, padding }).

props.name: divider
props.desc: Show a divider line between each column.

props.name: dividerColor
props.desc: CSS color of the column dividers.

props.name: dividerHeight
props.desc: Height of the divider line (e.g. '60%', '40px').

props.name: dividerMargin
props.desc: Horizontal margin around each divider in pixels.

props.name: dividerThickness
props.desc: Thickness of the divider line (e.g. '1px', '2px').

props.name: dividerWidth
props.desc: Width override for the divider element.

props.name: gap
props.desc: Gap between columns in pixels.

props.name: orientation
props.desc: Direction the info cells are laid out.

props.name: dashed
props.desc: Render the separator line as dashed instead of solid.

props.name: inline
props.desc: Render the separator inline with surrounding content.

props.name: lineHeight
props.desc: Height of the separator line (e.g. '1px').

props.name: lineType
props.desc: Direction of the separator line.

props.name: lineWidth
props.desc: Width of the separator line (e.g. '100%', '200px').

props.name: orientation
props.desc: Position of the section title relative to the line.

props.name: titleStyle
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to the section title text.

props.name: columns
props.desc: Column definitions — each with a resizable size value and child components.

props.name: align
props.desc: Align items along the cross axis.

props.name: direction
props.desc: Direction items are spaced.

props.name: marginLeft
props.desc: Left margin of the space container in pixels.

props.name: marginRight
props.desc: Right margin of the space container in pixels.

props.name: size
props.desc: Preset gap between items. Use sizeNumber for a custom pixel value.

props.name: sizeNumber
props.desc: Custom gap between items in pixels (overrides size).

props.name: wrap
props.desc: Allow items to wrap onto the next line.

props.name: defaultActiveKey
props.desc: Key of the tab that is active on first render.

props.name: tabLineColor
props.desc: CSS color of the active tab indicator line.

props.name: tabPosition
props.desc: Where the tab strip is rendered relative to the content.

props.name: tabs
props.desc: Tab pane definitions — each with key, title, icon, hidden, permissions, and child components.

props.name: tabType
props.desc: Visual style of the tab strip.

props.name: buttonsLayout
props.desc: Alignment of the navigation buttons.

props.name: defaultActiveStep
props.desc: Key of the step that is active on first render.

props.name: direction
props.desc: Direction the step indicators are laid out.

props.name: labelPlacement
props.desc: Whether step labels are placed beside or below the step icon.

props.name: showStepStatus
props.desc: Show a status indicator (finish/process/wait/error) on each step.

props.name: steps
props.desc: Step definitions — each with title, description, icon, navigation actions, and child components.

props.name: stepWidth
props.desc: Width of each step indicator (e.g. '120px').

props.name: wizardType
props.desc: 'default' shows a progress stepper; 'navigation' shows a navigable step bar.

props.name: apiMode
props.desc: Whether the API is called by entity name or a custom URL.

props.name: dataSource
props.desc: Whether the sub-form data comes from the parent form or a separate API call.

props.name: entityType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person'). Used when apiMode is 'entityName'.

props.name: formId
props.desc: Form to render inside the sub-form container.

props.name: formSelectionMode
props.desc: Whether the form is resolved by name or dynamically by entity type.

props.name: formType
props.desc: Form type hint used when formSelectionMode is 'dynamic'.

props.name: getUrl
props.desc: URL to GET the entity data from.

props.name: labelCol
props.desc: Ant Design label column span (1–24).

props.name: onCreated
props.desc: Called after the sub-form entity is created successfully.

props.name: onUpdated
props.desc: Called after the sub-form entity is updated successfully.

props.name: postUrl
props.desc: URL to POST a new entity record to.

props.name: properties
props.desc: Comma-separated or space-separated list of entity properties to fetch.

props.name: putUrl
props.desc: URL to PUT (update) an existing entity record.

props.name: queryParams
props.desc: Script returning extra query parameters appended to the GET request.

props.name: uniqueStateId
props.desc: Unique identifier used to isolate this sub-form's state from other sub-forms on the same page.

props.name: wrapperCol
props.desc: Ant Design wrapper column span (1–24).

props.name: gap
props.desc: Gap between menu items in pixels.

props.name: items
props.desc: Menu item definitions (antd ItemType array).

props.name: menuOverflow
props.desc: How items that overflow the menu bar are handled.

props.name: styleOnHover
props.desc: Inline CSS expression applied to menu items on hover.

props.name: styleOnSelected
props.desc: Inline CSS expression applied to the selected menu item.

props.name: styleOnSubMenu
props.desc: Inline CSS expression applied to sub-menu containers.
